description: ol-style-useless-value (issue #115): reproduces the spec's own worked example verbatim (spec/tooling.md:254-262) — a long-form `repeat 4 ... end repeat` whose block's only statement is `:side * 2`, a value-producing expression whose value is discarded. `params` carry `form:"repeat"`. The span covers the whole `repeat` node (head through `end repeat`). `:side` is declared first to isolate the code, the same pattern issue #114's `no-value-map-worked-example` fixture uses.
